mnemonics.title: EVM Properties: DSSG
mnemonics.content:
**D**eterministic - same input, same output
**S**andboxed - isolated execution, no external access
**S**tack-based - LIFO architecture
**G**as-metered - every operation costs gas, prevents infinite loops

mnemonics.title: Ethereum vs Bitcoin: STAMPS
mnemonics.content:
**S**mart contracts (Turing-complete vs limited)
**T**ransaction model (Account vs UTXO)
**A**pplication platform (dApps vs currency)
**M**erge to PoS (vs PoW)
**P**rogrammable (Solidity vs Bitcoin Script)
**S**peed (~12s vs ~10min blocks)

mnemonics.title: Two Account Types: EOA vs Contract
mnemonics.content:
**EOA** = External Owner, Active initiator
 - Private key controlled, can START transactions
**Contract** = Code Controlled, Called by others
 - Has code + storage, CANNOT start transactions alone

mnemonics.title: Ethereum Timeline: WFDDBLMS
mnemonics.content:
**W**hitepaper (2013)
**F**unding crowdsale (2014)
**D**eployment/Frontier (2015)
**D**AO hack + fork (2016)
**B**yzantium (2017)
**L**ondon/EIP-1559 (2021)
**M**erge to PoS (2022)
**S**hanghai withdrawals (2023)

mnemonics.title: Gas = Fuel for the World Computer
mnemonics.content:
Gas is to Ethereum what fuel is to a car:
- No gas = car stops = contract halts
- More distance = more fuel = more computation = more gas
- Price varies = gas price fluctuates with demand
- Unused fuel returned = unused gas refunded
